app_subtitle: Medical Technology Study Program - Institut Teknologi Sepuluh Nopember

detection.title: Gaze Detection Wizard
detection.description: Process eye tracking videos to extract gaze positions
detection.method_hough_desc: Geometric circle detection - best for clean, well-defined pupils
detection.method_contour_desc: Shape analysis with ellipse fitting - handles irregular pupils
detection.method_color_desc: HSV color segmentation - works with high-contrast scenarios
detection.method_blob_desc: Optimized blob detection - fast and versatile

game.title: Math Quiz Game
game.description: Eye-controlled math quiz with real-time tracking
game.question: Question
game.tutorial_instructions: Look at the START button to begin the tutorial
game.main_instructions: Look at the START button to begin the game

stimulus.title: Stimulus Simulation Wizard
stimulus.description: Generate or run live stimulus protocols
stimulus.opening_text:
Eye Tracking Simulation Session
Will Begin Shortly
stimulus.tutorial_instruction:
TUTORIAL:
Follow the center of target.
stimulus.fixation_instruction:
TASK 1: FIXATION
Stare at center of target.

database.title: Session Database
database.confirm_delete_session: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This cannot be undone.

obs.step1_info: This wizard will help you set up OBS Studio for screen recording during eye tracking experiments. First, we need to locate your OBS Studio installation.
obs.step2_info: Configure your recording preferences for eye tracking sessions.
obs.step3_info: Create a dedicated OBS profile optimized for eye tracking experiments.
obs.step4_info: Test your OBS setup to ensure everything is working correctly.
obs.complete_message: OBS Studio has been configured successfully for eye tracking experiments.
obs.download_info: OBS Studio is not installed on your system. Please download and install it first.
obs.profile_instructions:
A new OBS profile will be created with the following settings:

• Display capture source for recording your screen
• Optimized encoding settings for eye tracking
• Automatic file naming with timestamps
• Audio capture settings as configured

You can customize these settings later in OBS Studio.
obs.profile_created: OBS profile has been configured. You can now use it for your experiments.
obs.profile_error: Failed to create OBS profile. Please check your settings.
obs.test_step1: Launch OBS Studio using the button below
obs.test_step2: Select the 'EyeTracking' profile from the Profile menu
obs.test_step4: Wait a few seconds, then click 'Stop Recording'
obs.test_step5: Verify the recording in your output folder
obs.launched: OBS Studio has been launched. Please follow the test steps.
obs.path_not_found: OBS Studio path not found. Please set the correct path.
obs.folder_not_found: Recording folder not found. Please check your settings.
obs.path_required: Please specify the path to OBS Studio executable.
obs.wizard_complete: OBS Studio setup is complete. You can now use it to record your experiments.
obs.next_step1: Launch OBS Studio before starting experiments
obs.next_step3: Start recording manually or enable auto-start

wizard.confirm_clear_videos: Are you sure you want to clear all videos?
wizard.method_selection_desc: Choose one or more detection methods. Multiple methods can be compared.
wizard.no_methods_selected: Please select at least one detection method
wizard.kalman_desc: Smooth gaze trajectories and reduce noise using Kalman filtering
wizard.parallel_desc: Process multiple methods simultaneously for faster results
wizard.alignment_desc: Align multiple videos frame-by-frame if needed. You can skip this step.
wizard.alignment_not_implemented: Frame alignment tool will be added in a future update
wizard.ready_to_process: Ready to process. Click 'Start Processing' to begin.
wizard.video_viewer_not_implemented: Video viewer will be added in a future update
wizard.please_select_video: Please select a video file first
wizard.please_select_method: Please select at least one detection method
wizard.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel? All progress will be lost.

messages.welcome: Welcome to Eye Tracker Research Software!
messages.first_run: This appears to be your first time running the software. Let's check your system setup.
messages.system_check_ok: All system requirements are met. You're ready to start!
messages.system_check_fail: Some system requirements are not met. Please check the details.
messages.tobii_not_found: Tobii Eye Tracker not detected. Please connect your device and try again.
messages.obs_not_found: OBS Studio not detected. Please install OBS Studio to use real-time features.
messages.low_ram: Available RAM is below recommended minimum (8 GB). Performance may be affected.
messages.error_loading_video: Error loading video file. Please check the file format and try again.
messages.error_camera: Error accessing virtual camera. Please check OBS Virtual Camera is running.
messages.confirm_exit: Are you sure you want to exit? Unsaved data will be lost.
messages.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

settings.paths_info: Note: Directories will be created automatically if they don't exist. Use relative paths for portability.
settings.performance_info: Performance settings are automatically optimized based on system capabilities.
settings.window_too_small: Window size must be at least 800x600 pixels
settings.invalid_radius_range: Minimum radius must be less than maximum radius
settings.invalid_area_range: Minimum area must be less than maximum area
settings.invalid_size_range: Minimum size must be less than maximum size
settings.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
settings.reset_success: Settings have been reset to default values
settings.save_before_close: Do you want to save your changes before closing?

alignment.title: Video Alignment Wizard
alignment.load_instructions: Add 2 or more videos to align and synchronize. Videos can be from different cameras or recording sessions.
alignment.need_two_videos: Please add at least 2 videos for alignment
alignment.load_failed: Failed to load one or more videos
alignment.alignment_method: How would you like to align the videos?
alignment.manual_desc: Manually select synchronization points by viewing frames. Most precise but requires user input.
alignment.flash_desc: Automatically detect bright flash in all videos (e.g., camera flash, LED). Record a flash at the start of all cameras.
alignment.audio_desc: Automatically detect audio peaks (e.g., clap, beep). Requires librosa package.
alignment.motion_desc: Automatically detect sudden motion events. Works when all cameras capture same movement.
alignment.manual_instructions: Use the sliders to find matching frames across all videos. Click 'Sync Here' when frames are aligned. You can play videos together to verify synchronization.
alignment.need_sync_point: Please add at least one synchronization point
alignment.auto_failed: Automatic alignment failed. Please try manual alignment.
